tree.text: A Summary of the San Francisco Earthquake
tree.notes: 这是一篇旧金山大地震概要的基础版写作，包含地震发生、随后的火灾和人们的冷静行为。
tree.statement: 本文概述了1906年旧金山大地震和随之而来的严重火灾。
tree.explanation: 概要中提及了地震的爆发时间、造成的重大损失（火灾加剧破坏）以及人们在灾难中冷静友善的举止。

children.text: On April 18, 1906, a huge earthquake hit San Francisco at a quarter past five in the morning.
children.cn: 1906年4月18日早晨5点15分，一场大地震袭击了旧金山。
children.notes: at a quarter past five 意为“在5点15分”；hit 是及物动词，此处使用过去式。
children.explanation: a quarter past five 表示5点过了一刻钟，即5点15分。

children.text: The earthquake broke water pipes, so the firemen could not stop the fire that followed.
children.cn: 地震震碎了水管，所以消防员无法阻止随之而来的大火。
children.notes: broke 是 break 的过去式；that followed 引导定语从句，修饰 fire。
children.statement: so 在这里连接了两个表示因果关系的并列句成分。
children.explanation: so 是并列连词，用于引导表示结果的并列分句。

children.text: The fire burned for days and destroyed most buildings, leaving tens of thousands of people without homes.
children.cn: 大火烧了几天，摧毁了大部分建筑物，使数万人无家可归。
children.notes: leaving... without... 是现在分词短语作结果状语，表示“留下/使……处于某种状态”。
children.statement: leaving tens of thousands of people without homes 表示大火导致了无家可归的后果。
children.explanation: 现在分词短语作结果状语，表示随之而来的、自然而然的、非蓄意产生的结果。

children.text: However, this worst disaster brought out the best in the survivors.
children.cn: 然而，这最坏的灾难激发出了幸存者最好的一面。
children.notes: bring out 意为“激发，展现”；survivors 意为“幸存者”。
children.statement: brought out 是 bring out 的过去式形式。
children.explanation: bring out的过去式是不规则变化 brought out。

children.text: People behaved very kindly and helped each other to look for shelter during the night of terror.
children.cn: 在那个恐怖的夜晚，人们举止非常友善，互相帮助寻找避难所。
children.notes: helped each other to do sth. 帮助彼此做某事；during the night of terror 在恐怖的夜晚。
children.statement: kindly 是形容词，修饰 behaved。
children.explanation: kindly 是副词，用来修饰动词 behaved，表示“友善地”。

tree.text: An Advanced Summary of the San Francisco Eyewitness Account
tree.cn: 旧金山大地震目击者报告的高级版概要
tree.notes: 使用了更为丰富的词汇和复杂句式（包括非限制性定语从句和分词短语等）来写旧金山大地震概要。
tree.statement: 本篇高级版概要对目击者报告进行了深度总结，使用了多样的句式结构。
tree.explanation: 文章不仅概括了地震与火灾的爆发及巨大破坏，还着重描绘了消防受阻原因与灾民高尚的集体表现。

children.text: A devastating earthquake struck San Francisco on Wednesday morning, April 18, 1906, causing immediate damage to buildings and chimneys.
children.cn: 1906年4月18日星期三清晨，一场毁灭性的地震袭击了旧金山，对房屋和烟囱造成了直接的破坏。
children.notes: devastating 毁灭性的；struck 是 strike 的过去式；causing... 是现在分词短语作伴随结果状语。
children.statement: struck 在这里是一个及物动词。
children.explanation: strike 意为“袭击，侵袭”，后面直接接宾语 San Francisco，所以是及物动词。

children.text: What made things even worse was that the earthquake broke the city's water mains, leaving firemen completely helpless as the subsequent fire swept through the working-class neighbourhoods.
children.cn: 更糟糕的是，地震震碎了城市的主要供水管道，使消防员在随后的火灾席卷工薪阶层社区时完全无能为力。
children.notes: what made things even worse was that... 结构作为主语从句和表语从句；subsequent 随后的；swept through 席卷。
children.statement: What 引导的是一个宾语从句。
children.explanation: What 引导的是主语从句，在主句中充当主语的角色。
children.keywords: water mains, firemen, subsequent, swept through
children.highlight: What, was that, leaving, as the

children.text: Within a few hours, the fire became uncontrollable, destroying the very heart of the city and driving tens of thousands of citizens out of their ruined homes to seek shelter.
children.cn: 在几个小时内，大火变得无法控制，摧毁了城市的中心，并迫使成千上万的市民离开被毁的家园去寻找庇护所。
children.notes: destroying... and driving... 是现在分词并列作结果状语；the very heart 最中心区域。
children.statement: ruined 是一个动词的过去分词形式，在此作前置定语修饰 homes。
children.explanation: ruined 是 ruin 的过去分词，在此处充当形容词，意为“被毁坏的”，作 homes 的定语。

children.text: Despite the terrible disaster, there were no fights, as the tragedy surprisingly brought out the best in the survivors.
children.cn: 尽管灾难极其可怕，却没有任何争斗，因为这场悲剧令人惊讶地激发了幸存者心中最好的一面。
children.notes: despite 尽管（后接名词或名词短语）；as 引导原因状语从句，意为“因为”。
children.statement: despite 可以替换为 although，且句型结构完全不用改变。
children.explanation: despite 是介词，后接名词短语；although 是连词，后接句子。若要替换，需将后面的短语改写为从句。

children.text: They behaved with great kindness and solidarity, proving that human spirit could shine even in the darkest night of terror.
children.cn: 他们表现出了极大的善良与团结，证明了人类的精神即使在最黑暗、恐怖的夜晚也能闪耀光芒。
children.notes: solidarity 团结，一致；proving... 分词短语作伴随状语；shine 闪耀。
children.explanation: proving 是现在分词短语作状语，而 proving 后面接的 that 从句才是宾语从句。
children.highlight: with, proving that, even in the
